feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: ABAP Integration with FastAPI for File Uploads: Seeking Code Guidance
entry.content:
Problem Statement:

I am working on integrating an ABAP system with a FastAPI server to upload files via HTTP POST requests. I have a FastAPI endpoint set up to receive file uploads, and I need assistance with creating the ABAP code to send a file to this endpoint.

Description:

  1. FastAPI Endpoint: I have a FastAPI endpoint (POST /upload/) set up to receive file uploads. The endpoint expects the file to be included in the body of the request.

  2. ABAP System: On the ABAP side, I need to write code that reads a file from the filesystem and sends it to the FastAPI endpoint via an HTTP POST request.

Requirements:

  1. HTTP POST Request: The ABAP code should construct an HTTP POST request to the FastAPI endpoint.

  2. Multipart Form Data: The file should be sent as multipart form data in the body of the POST request.

    curl -X POST -F "file=@data.json" https://endpoint.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com/upload/ This curl works on vscode or command prompt. I want to achieve same from ABAP. 

    Server accepts data file containing JSON, does processing and returns JSON. Sever side is python.
    #if_http_client #abap #btp #httprequests #fileuploads #Post @Tomas_Buryanek I saw your answer for similar query on image upload to servicenow. Kindly help with this, seeking your expertise.

    Regards,
    Naveen

entry.title: How to export CSV file with standard and custom API S/4HANA Cloud public edition
entry.content:
My customer request some requirements about processing CSV in S/4HANA Cloud. 

  1. Can I enhance logic of a standard API( ex OData, SOAP) to return CSV file for client who call API. Can I enhance logic of a standard API to store a CSV file in server or local? (S/4HANA Cloud-standard APIs)
  2. Can I create a custom API(ex OData, HTTP service) to return CSV file for client who call API. Can custome API store a CSV file in server or local?

About custom API, I created a simple HTTP service. But when I call FM GUI_DOWNLOAD to store a CSV file, I get an error that is using FM GUI_DOWNLOAD is not permitted.

I don't have technical knowledge to resolve this customer request. So, can hep me and give me knowledge related to my customer's request?

Best regards

entry.title: How to read Master Data Consolidation Process ID?
entry.content: How to read Consolidation Process ID inside USMD_RULE_SERVICE BADI i.e. inside Check entity method

entry.title: ABAP Cloud Project Creation Error in ADT
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I am getting this weird error : You were successfully authenticated, but an error occurred during fetching the Service Instance's SAP System ID.

As i refered atleast 10 different blogs and solutions but still not able to resolve this issue

Simply, I have created abap enviroinment and try to create abap cloud project in ADT , But ending up getting this error.

I have tried booster and manually created abap enviroinment , its of no use

Need your solution ...

Screenshots : 

ABAP Cloud SAP BTP, ABAP environment ABAP Connectivity

entry.title: I created an advanced excel file with abap ole object. But I want to send an e-mail instead of downl
entry.content:
This is how I can download an advanced excel file with abap ole object. But I want to send it by e-mail without downloading it.
 
CALL METHOD OF

    e_work
    'SAVEAS'
    EXPORTING
      #1 = gv_fullpath.

  CALL METHOD OF
    e_work
    'close'.
  CALL METHOD OF
    e_appl
    'QUIT'.
  FREE OBJECT e_appl.
  ENDIF.

entry.title: fb02-Assignment field (BSEG-ZUONR) field length will be shortened
entry.content:
Hi,

In fb02, can the length of the BSEG_ZUONR field be added to a control that is not an 8-character numeric value?

for example; It shouldn't be 11111111, it could be ab111111 or abcdabbc.

UPDATE !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

PRE REQUISITE: syst-tcode <> 'fb02'

CHECK : 

BSEG-ZUONR :9-9: = ''

AND BSEG-ZUONR :8-8: <> ''

AND BSEG-ZUONR :7-7: <> ''

AND BSEG-ZUONR :6-6: <> ''

AND BSEG-ZUONR :5-5: <> ''

AND BSEG-ZUONR :4-4: <> ''

AND BSEG-ZUONR :3-3: <> ''

AND BSEG-ZUONR :2-2: <> ''

AND BSEG-ZUONR :1-1: <> ''

BUT, I HAVE A PROBLEM. I NEED A NON-NUMERIC CODE.

entry.title: Odata GET_EXPANDED_ENTITYSET( ) returns empty structure
entry.content:
Hi Odata experts,
I have a requirement where i am calling a Z*FM which OUTPUTS 3 internal tables about a customer data(say).
I implemented the GET_EXPANDED_ENTITYSET( ) method with a NESTED structure(types & tables) to hold all these internal tables. I send Customer# as input parameter to this Z*FM* and the data is being filled up into the 3 OUTPUT tables. I am able to update the NESTED structure which i can see in calling below method:

CALL METHOD me->/iwbep/if_mgw_conv_srv_runtime~copy_data_to_ref
EXPORTING
is_data = it_bphdr(NESTED struc)
CHANGING
cr_data = er_entityset.


I use a query like below:
/sap/opu/odata/SAP/ZTEST***SRV/BPInputsSet('10120115')?$expand=NavtoPartnerData&$format=json

I see that data getting filled in 'er_entityset' in a proper way as expected, but the FINAL output is returning 2 EMPTY structures. The output should have 4 records in one structure & 2 records in other one.

Can someone please help.

entry.title: POST Data of ALV Report using BDC for CO11N
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have to create an ALV report and POST the ALV data using BDC.

The BDC is required for CO11N Transaction.

Can someone help me with the code, how the ALV data will be posted using BDC.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Alex Dsouza

entry.title: Re: POST Data of ALV Report using BDC for CO11N
entry.content:
• Did you consider using BAPI such as BAPI_PRODORDCONF_GET_TT_PROP, BAPI_PRODORDCONF_CREATE_TT, BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT
  • Else use SHDB on CO11N or CO11 but read first 1999131 - Batch input issues with transactions CO11 and CO11N

entry.title: Enhancement adding extra attachements to emails from Request for Quotation output
entry.content:
We are using Fiori tile Manage RFQ's to create request for quotations for suppliers. In these RFQ's we add attachments (drawings and other specifications).

With standard SAP we are able to send mail output from the Fiori tile but we cannot add the additional attachments to the output .

Now we would like to build custom functionality to add the attachment but we cannot figure out in where to do this. As the sending of the mail output is triggered via the Fiori tile we are not able to debug and find the correct  place or program to add our custom enhancements.

entry.title: Sorting issue with STRING_AGG in Hana Table function
entry.content:
hello Experts,

My requirement is to Aggregate the values in a sorted manner as below.

 

currently the code is as below.

FUNCTION .cs.I072-SB_Reporting.BUSINESSLOGIC.TABLE_FUNCTION::TF_SB_EFF_MSN_CONCAT" ( )
RETURNS TABLE(
"SB_NUMBER" NVARCHAR(10),
"MSN_LIST" NVARCHAR(5000),
"MSN_COUNT" INTEGER
)
LANGUAGE SQLSCRIPT
SQL SECURITY INVOKER AS
BEGIN
/*********************************
Merge all active status in single cell
 **********************************/

 return SELECT "SB_NUMBER",
   STRING_AGG("MSN",',') AS "MSN_LIST" ,
   COUNT("MSN") AS "MSN_COUNT"
FROM
(
SELECT DISTINCT
"SB_NUMBER",
CONCAT('X', lpad("MSN",5,'0')) AS "MSN"
FROM "INTERNAL_1S79"."class-Reporting.TABLEDEF::EFF.ZT_EFFECT_MSN_SB" as "ZT_EFFECT_MSN_SB"
LEFT OUTER JOIN "_SYS_BIC"."class-Reporting.BASE/CV_XCS_ZDCI0T_SB_REVI" as "CV_XCS_ZDCI0T_SB_REVI"
ON "ZT_EFFECT_MSN_SB".SB_NUMBER = "CV_XCS_ZDCI0T_SB_REVI"."SB_NUM"
WHERE ( "MSN" NOT IN ('425', '441', '434', '444', '482', '484', '522', '523') AND "CV_XCS_ZDCI0T_SB_REVI"."AC_TYPE" = '2')
OR "CV_XCS_ZDCI0T_SB_REVI"."AC_TYPE" <> '2'
order by "MSN", "SB_NUMBER"
)

group by "SB_NUMBER"  ;
END;

But I am getting results as below. The string aggregation is not in sorted manner

 

I want to implement similar logic which is below in console but I am getting error while using Order  by with STRING_AGG function.

Here I am getting correct values but while trying to implement below code in Table function I am getting error as "Syntax error. "order" is incorrect or misplaced."

Please help me how can I achieve above results in Table functions.

entry.title: Dynpro PAI was not triggered if no field changed
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have two dynpro sub-screens with one field respectively. Let's say screen A and field FA, screen B and field FB. FA and FB has relationship and needs to be checked after either of them was changed.

However, since they are in different screens, the check logic needs to be implemented in both screens, otherwise, e.g., field FA was changed but screen B PAI was not triggered.

Is there any better choice for me?

Regards,
Eric

entry.title: Any approach to use Function Module 'READ_TEXT' in CDS view without the use of Virtual Elements ?
entry.content:
I have to read the TDLINE value for one of the Text Field in FB03 using READ_TEXT Function Module.

Any approach/alternative to use 'READ_TEXT' in CDS View without using Virtual Elements ?

entry.title: Code for CDS Table Function to convert STXL - LRAW data to STRING ?
entry.content: Can someone provide a code reference to convert LRAW data from STXL table to STRING format via CDS Table function.

entry.title: CDS View used in End routine is not working when performing delta operation to DTP in BW4HANA.
entry.content:
CDS based View used in End routine is not working when performing delta operation to DTP in BW4HANA. FULL Mode of DTP is working fine. Unable to find the issue.

Here is the CDS Code,

AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZMM_DBV_XXXX'
AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
EndUserText.label: 'Effectiveness'
VDM.viewType: #BASIC

define view ZPM_CDS_BA_XXXXXXX as select   from XXXXXX as _a {
    _a./bic/zcpermit,
    _a./bic/zcshftdt,
    _a./bic/zcshfstim,
    sum (1)  as Cnt

} where _a.signedon <> '00000000'
group by
   _a./bic/zcpermit,
    _a./bic/zcshftdt,
    _a./bic/zcshfstim

entry.title: ESS Personal Profile showing incorrect Postal Code & City
entry.content:
Hi all,

In ESS personal profile, while trying to add bank details in portal , Postal Code and City are showing incorrect data.

Postal Code and City are getting updated in portal from one of the record in PA0009

There are 6 records in PA0009, It is fetching the incorrect record. How to know on which condition it is fetching that particular incorrect record ?

I've debugged the issue in standard feeder class but unable to find the solution.

Could someone please help.

Thankyou

entry.title: Send Payment Summary file by email from F110
entry.content:
Hello,

We are running F110 and instead of printing the Payment Summary, we would like to send it to certain users by email.  In the screenshot below, I clicked Spool Request -> Forward from the menu.  We would like to do something like this automatically.  I have seen several posts talking about BTE 00002040 and 00002050 but I think that is for Payment advices. If it can be changed to use the Summary, that would be great. 

Thank you for any suggestions.

entry.title: Is it safe to use ENQUEUE_ESINDX in S/4HANA?
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are migrating to S/4HANA and our ATC lists all usage of ENQUEUE_ESINDX (Used to make sure sure program/table is only used by one person at a time) as priority 1 "error". In the attached SAP Note there's no mention of this FM specifically, it's a general note for SAP S/4HANA custom code adaption - removal of orphaned objects. 

I've tested the programs and this functionality specifically and it's still working just fine. Should I be worried this would be suddenly removed in a minor update in the future?

If I need to address this, what should I use instead of ENQUEUE_ESINDX and DEQUEUE_ESINDX?

Thanks,
Birgir Snorrason

entry.title: shipping metrics: lines shipped & pieces shipped.
entry.content: I'm currently looking into shipping metrics, specifically lines shipped and items shipped. Could someone kindly help me identify the appropriate tables for this data? Thank you!

entry.title: Receiving metrics: Lines received & pieces received
entry.content:
I'm currently looking into Receiving metrics, specifically lines received and items received. Could someone kindly help me identify the appropriate tables for this data?

Thank you!
